name: ingest_content
description: Parse raw user content into a structured NoteSpec candidate. First step of the ingest loop.

name: retrieve_similar_notes
description: Vector-only nearest-neighbor lookup. Used during ingest to dedup-check a candidate before save.

name: save_note
description: Persist a note to the vault under the strict frontmatter contract. Goes through preview gate.

name: update_index
description: Re-chunk and re-embed the listed notes after a save. Idempotent on unchanged content_hash.

name: search_notes
description: Hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + graph boost) over the chunk index. Primary entry point for the query loop.

name: rerank_results
description: Cross-encoder rerank of search_notes candidates. Skip for mode='literal'.

name: get_note_context
description: Fetch full note bodies and frontmatter for a small set of paths.

name: create_synthesis_note
description: Write a synthesis note grounded in multiple existing notes.
